message:
Add Codex connector edge-case tests and finalize E2E PhaseTracker migration

Codex connector: add robustness test suite covering truncated JSONL
(mid-JSON and mid-UTF-8), invalid UTF-8 line skipping, empty/whitespace
files, JSON type mismatches, deeply nested JSON (200+ levels), large
message bodies (1MB), 100MB+ file skip mechanism, embedded null bytes,
and UTF-8 BOM handling. Mirrors the edge-case coverage already added
to the Claude Code connector.

E2E tests (e2e_multi_connector, e2e_sources): continue PhaseTracker
migration with refined phase boundaries and tracker usage across
remaining test functions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
